title: Red Frogs (Hypixel Skyblock)
description: This Resourcepack makes Green Frogs completely red (hypixel skyblock mossybit farming)
body:
A resourcepack to make mossibit farming more tolerable.
I couldn't find one on modrinth so i made one really quick

It specifically only has the modified cold_frog.png texture inside to save storage.

made for those shard hunters out there :D
